title: Bedrock Wither
body:
# Bedrock Wither
This mod adds bedrock withers to the game. Literally. To be clear, this mod does NOT:
- Increase the wither's health
- Add any extra attacks
- Make the wither harder in any way


What this mod does do:
- allow withers to be made out of bedrock


![A wither made of bedrock](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f372b21433a548da049a3202786b13e933f7158c_0.webp)
(the one and only feature of this mod)
